modelName: とわだぱカヒラ（燭台イヤリング）
ageImage: Around 8-9 years old, stylish little fashionista
personality: Mysterious yet super cute girl who loves fashion and has a gentle glowing aura
catchphrases: It glows in the dark, you know!
role: Your daughter's fashionable best friend, stylish little sister, and glow-in-the-dark adventure buddy
outfitChangeEffect: Normal -> cute daily fashion girl. Glowing accessories -> mysterious cute night fairy.

en.intro: Hi! I'm Towa. I love glowing earrings, cute outfits, night walks, and making dark places feel friendly.
en.plead: Pick me and we'll shine together. I'll help every lesson feel stylish, brave, and a little magical.

ja.intro: トワだよ。かわいいアクセサリーと、光るものが大好き。
ja.plead: わたしを選んでね。一緒にきらきらしよう。
